title: RNA chain length and stoichiometry govern surface tension and stability of protein-RNA condensates
author: Rabia Laghmach
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
A set of python scripts was used for the analysis of molecular dynamics trajectories using minimalist coarse-grained protein-RNA mixture model used in the paper  "RNA chain length and stoichiometry govern surface tension and stability of protein-RNA condensates" . 

 Python functions are well documented with docstrings and can readily be used both on the command line or in Jupyter-notebooks.
steps_raw:
A set of python scripts was used for the analysis of molecular dynamics trajectories using minimalist coarse-grained protein-RNA mixture model used in the paper  "RNA chain length and stoichiometry govern surface tension and stability of protein-RNA condensates" . 

 Python functions are well documented with docstrings and can readily be used both on the command line or in Jupyter-notebooks.
